payload.answer: I can help record this family relationship, but I won’t save it without your confirmation.
repair_options: Add a new family memory: Nur and Sara are your twin daughters.
If Nur and Sara already exist separately in memory, link both as your daughters and mark them as twins.
Keep this as an unsaved note for now and do not update memory.
